user_query: I need a local, reproducible follow-up reminder pass for recent interview notes. Please do the following using only local files. 1) Inspect the directory input/interviews/ and parse every .md file it contains. In each file, read the simple key: value metadata lines (exact keys shown below) and ignore any non-metadata content except where subject_hint and message_hint appear as metadata. 2) From those files, generate a reminders CSV at output/followups/reminders.csv with the header: contact_name,community,preferred_channel,due_date,subject,message,source_file. Include one row per interview that satisfies ALL of these conditions: archived is false, consent_status is not "declined", and follow_up_required is "yes". Compute due_date deterministically as last_contacted plus an offset based on priority: high = +7 days, normal = +14 days, low = +21 days. Format due_date as YYYY-MM-DD. Use subject_hint for the subject field and message_hint for the message field. Sort rows by due_date ascending. 3) Update the existing docs/Follow-Up.md by rewriting only the section between the markers <!-- PENDING-FOLLOWUPS:START --> and <!-- PENDING-FOLLOWUPS:END --> so it contains one bullet per reminder in the exact format: "- [ ] YYYY-MM-DD Contact Name via Preferred_Channel (Community) — Subject", sorted by due_date ascending. Keep everything outside the markers unchanged. 4) Write a summary JSON to output/followups/summary.json with the shape {"total_reminders": number, "by_community": {"<Community>": count, ...}, "by_channel": {"<Channel>": count, ...}} computed from the CSV you generated. Cross-checks to satisfy: the number of bullets inserted into docs/Follow-Up.md must equal the number of data rows in output/followups/reminders.csv, and total_reminders in summary.json must match that count. Metadata keys to parse per interview file: contact_name, community, last_contacted (YYYY-MM-DD), preferred_channel, time_zone, consent_status, priority (high|normal|low), archived (true|false), follow_up_required (yes|no), subject_hint, message_hint. Input path(s): input/interviews/. Output path(s): output/followups/reminders.csv, output/followups/summary.json, and an in-place edit of docs/Follow-Up.md. Do not hardcode filenames; discover .md files by inspecting the directory. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
